title: FE-06 - Implementation Map For Current Codebase
description: Map truc tiep FE-06 vao file C# hien co trong codebase. AI Agent doc file nay de biet chinh xac file nao da ton tai, file nao can sua, thu tu implement.

techStack.architecture: Modular Monolith (CQRS via Dispatcher, IRepository<T,Guid>, schema isolation)

existingForFe06.description: GenerateBoundaryNegative endpoint (POST generate-boundary-negative) va GetAll, GetById test case queries.
CQRS command + handler voi 10-step pipeline: validate, gate check, existing check, subscription check, delete old, generate, persist transaction, increment usage, build result.
Orchestrator service: fetch metadata, per-endpoint path+body mutations, LLM suggestions, assign OrderIndex.
Rule-based body mutation engine: 6 mutation types (emptyBody, malformedJson, missingRequired, typeMismatch, overflow, invalidEnum) + schema-based mutations.
LLM scenario suggestion via n8n webhook: cache check, prompt build, n8n call, audit log, parse, cache save.
Body mutation model: MutationType, Label, MutatedBody, TargetFieldName, ExpectedStatusCode, Description, SuggestedTestType.
API response model voi per-pipeline counts va test case summaries.
n8n webhook request payload: TestSuiteId, TestSuiteName, GlobalBusinessRules, Endpoints[].
n8n webhook response: Scenarios[], Model, TokensUsed.
API request model: SpecificationId, ForceRegenerate, IncludePathMutations, IncludeBodyMutations, IncludeLlmSuggestions.

sharedWithFe05.description: FE-05A gate service — shared voi FE-05B va FE-06.
Build TestCaseRequest tu n8n response — shared voi happy-path builder.
Build TestCaseExpectation tu n8n response — shared voi happy-path builder.
Map endpoint metadata to prompt context — shared voi happy-path.
n8n webhook caller interface — shared voi happy-path.
Build Observation-Confirmation prompts — shared voi happy-path.

entities.note: Reuse — TestType enum da co Boundary=1 va Negative=2.

apiDocumentation.description: Fetch endpoint basic info (HttpMethod, Path, OperationId, SchemaPayloads).
Fetch parameter details (Name, Location, DataType, Format, IsRequired, DefaultValue, Schema, Examples).

llmAssistant.description: Cross-module boundary cho LLM audit trail va suggestion caching.

subscription.description: Cross-module boundary cho subscription limit checking va usage tracking.

unitTests.description: Unit tests cho command handler: gate fail, validation, force regenerate, empty result, subscription limit.
Unit tests cho 6 mutation types: emptyBody, malformedJson, missingRequired, typeMismatch, overflow, invalidEnum.
Unit tests cho orchestrator: 3 pipeline toggle, metadata fetch, test case building.
Unit tests cho LLM suggester: cache hit, cache miss, n8n call, parse response, audit log.
Unit tests cho request builder (shared with FE-05B).
Unit tests cho expectation builder (shared with FE-05B).
Unit tests cho prompt context mapper (shared with FE-05B).

moduleStructure.description: FE-06 nam toan bo trong ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration. Khong tao module moi. Khong sua module khac.

addedFiles.description: n8n webhook request payload + N8nBoundaryEndpointPayload + N8nParameterDetail.

modifiedFiles.change: Register: services.AddScoped<IBodyMutationEngine, BodyMutationEngine>(); services.AddScoped<ILlmScenarioSuggester, LlmScenarioSuggester>(); services.AddScoped<IBoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator, BoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator>();

unchangedFiles: Entities/*.cs — khong them entity moi, reuse tat ca entity tu FE-04/FE-05.
DbConfigurations/*.cs — khong sua cau hinh database.

databasePlan.reason: FE-06 reuse toan bo entity va table da co tu FE-04/FE-05 (testgen schema). TestCase.TestType da support Boundary=1 va Negative=2. Khong can them column hay table moi.
crossSchemaTablesUsed: llmassistant.LlmInteractions (via ILlmAssistantGatewayService, khong truy cap truc tiep)
llmassistant.LlmSuggestionCaches (via ILlmAssistantGatewayService, khong truy cap truc tiep)

flows.name: FE-06 Boundary/Negative Generation Flow
steps: 3. Handler validate (input, ownership, archived, pipeline enabled).
5. Handler check existing boundary/negative cases + subscription limits.
6. Handler delete old cases if ForceRegenerate=true.
7. Orchestrator fetch endpoint metadata + parameter details.
8. Orchestrator run path mutation pipeline (per endpoint, per path param).
9. Orchestrator run body mutation pipeline (per endpoint, 6 mutation types).
10. Orchestrator run LLM suggestion pipeline (cache check -> n8n call -> parse -> cache).
12. Handler persist all in transaction (TestCase, Request, Expectation, Variable, Dependency, ChangeLog, Version, Suite update).
14. Controller return 201 Created with result model.

qualityGates: Khong generate truoc khi FE-05A gate pass.
Khong truy cap ApiDocumentation/LlmAssistant/Subscription DbContext truc tiep.
Khong throw exception tu LLM audit log failure (graceful degradation).
Khong throw exception tu LLM cache failure (graceful degradation).
Transaction phai bao gom toan bo test case + change log + suite version + suite update.
Subscription usage increment phai chay NGOAI transaction chinh.
Delete old cases phai chay SAU subscription check, TRUOC main transaction.
Test case Tags phai duoc serialize dung format JSON array.

unitTests: BodyMutationEngine: 6 mutation types voi cac data types khac nhau.
BodyMutationEngine: schema-based mutations khi co JSON schema.
BodyMutationEngine: POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints tao empty body + malformed JSON.
BodyMutationEngine: GET endpoints KHONG tao body mutations.
BoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator: toggle tung pipeline rieng le.
BoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator: OrderIndex duoc gan tuan tu.
LlmScenarioSuggester: cache hit tra ket qua ngay, khong goi n8n.
LlmScenarioSuggester: cache miss goi n8n va cache ket qua.
LlmScenarioSuggester: partial cache miss (1 endpoint missing) goi n8n.
LlmScenarioSuggester: audit log failure khong throw.
integrationTests: Full pipeline: POST generate-boundary-negative voi mock n8n, verify test cases persisted.
Gate fail integration: verify 409 response voi correct error body.
Permission check: verify 403 khi thieu permission.
GET test-cases/{id} tra day du request + expectation + variables.

implementationSequence: 1. Models: BodyMutation, BoundaryNegativeResultModel, N8n payload/response, request model
4. Services: LlmScenarioSuggester (depends on IObservationConfirmationPromptBuilder, IN8nIntegrationService, ILlmAssistantGatewayService)
5. Services: BoundaryNegativeTestCaseGenerator (depends on metadata, parameter, path mutation, body engine, LLM suggester, builders)
